gates: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const task=fs.readFileSync(process.argv[1],'utf8'); for (const needle of ['## Required implementation','## Required tests','## Acceptance criteria']) { if(!task.includes(needle)) throw new Error('task missing section: '+needle); }" {{taskFile}}

$p='client/src/lib/skills/appbundle/appBundleSkill.ts'; if(-not (Select-String -LiteralPath 'client/src/lib/skills/appbundle/appBundleSkill.ts' -Pattern 'evaluateAppBundleRuntimeClosure' -SimpleMatch -Quiet)){ throw 'missing evaluateAppBundleRuntimeClosure in client/src/lib/skills/appbundle/appBundleSkill.ts' }; if(-not (Select-String -LiteralPath 'client/src/lib/skills/appbundle/appBundleSkill.ts' -Pattern 'APPBUNDLE_RUNTIME_CLOSURE_BLOCKED' -SimpleMatch -Quiet)){ throw 'missing APPBUNDLE_RUNTIME_CLOSURE_BLOCKED in client/src/lib/skills/appbundle/appBundleSkill.ts' }; if(-not (Select-String -LiteralPath 'client/src/lib/skills/appbundle/appBundleSkill.ts' -Pattern 'runtimeClosure' -SimpleMatch -Quiet)){ throw 'missing runtimeClosure in client/src/lib/skills/appbundle/appBundleSkill.ts' }
